summary: Comprehensive diagnostic matrix for Linux kernel Hard LOCKUP scenarios

matrix.trigger: Task {pid} blocked or hung for extended time
matrix.arg_hints: pid: PID of oldest failed task
matrix.why: Get backtrace of hung task to identify hang location
matrix.expect: Backtrace showing semaphore wait or contention

matrix.trigger: Need to inspect semaphore state and waiters
matrix.arg_hints: addr: Address from task_struct or backtrace
matrix.why: Check semaphore lock state and waiting tasks
matrix.expect: Semaphore owner count and waiter list

matrix.arg_hints: addr: Semaphore address from struct output
matrix.why: List all tasks contending for the semaphore

matrix.arg_hints: addr: Address from backtrace or task context
matrix.why: Check CPU stop targets and migration state

matrix.arg_hints: addr: Address from backtrace or task context
matrix.why: Check spinlock ownership and worker state
matrix.expect: Lock value, work list, and flags

matrix.trigger: Convert hex lock value to identify locking CPU
matrix.arg_hints: offset: Hex lock value from struct output
matrix.why: Identify which CPU holds the spinlock
matrix.expect: Decimal CPU number from lock encoding

matrix.trigger: Disassemble function to understand spinning loop
matrix.why: Disassemble function to see spinlock or hypervisor calls
matrix.expect: Instruction sequence showing loop or wait

matrix.arg_hints: pid: Task PID from lockup or backtrace
matrix.why: Verify if task is on CPU or runqueue
List hung tasks in UNINTERRUPTIBLE state
matrix.expect: Tasks with UN state and their PIDs

matrix.arg_hints: pid: Process ID from ps output
matrix.why: Get process arguments and environment

matrix.trigger: Task accessing device file at dentry {addr}
matrix.arg_hints: addr: Dentry address from files command
matrix.why: Check filesystem details for file or symlink
matrix.expect: File system information for the inode

matrix.arg_hints: addr: Superblock address from files output
matrix.why: Check filesystem mount details
Verify hung task detection timeout
Verify hung task warning settings
Locate hung task detection thread

matrix.trigger: Examine stack trace for task at address {addr}
matrix.why: Get stack trace for specific task
matrix.expect: Call chain showing task's execution path

matrix.trigger: Set context to specific task for analysis
matrix.why: Set context to specific task for further analysis
Look for syscall hooking
Get address and size of symbol
Find module information and addresses

matrix.trigger: Get detailed module information at address {addr}
matrix.why: Examine module metadata and signatures
matrix.expect: Module name, version, and signature status

matrix.why: Determine which cache allocated the object
matrix.expect: SLAB cache name and allocation details

matrix.arg_hints: flag: Flag name to look up
matrix.why: Check flag value definition
Check wait condition flags
Examine raw memory contents

matrix.trigger: Binary value needs interpretation for CPU identification

matrix.why: View device usage and errors
Examine assembly code flow
Find kernel thread daemon
Examine specific UN task details

matrix.trigger: Inspect run queue contents for cpu {cpu}

matrix.why: Examine spinlock waiting queues

matrix.arg_hints: cpu: CPU number for per-CPU var
matrix.why: Check CPU-specific lock state
Find kernel function address
Check lock state and owner
Check function signature
Examine function prologue
Compute stack frame location
Check file path information
Analyze CPU runqueue latency and load

matrix.trigger: Check structure field at address {addr} with offset {offset}
matrix.arg_hints: addr: Structure address, struct_name.field_name: from kernel headers
matrix.why: Examine specific structure field for corruption

matrix.trigger: Dump raw memory content at address {addr}

matrix.arg_hints: hex_value: Hex value from memory dump or register

matrix.trigger: List elements and search for address {addr}

matrix.why: Check watchdog timeout threshold

matrix.why: Get raw spinlock value for analysis

Examine cpumask to see targeted CPUs
